fn main() {
    let version = std::process::Command::new("git")
        .args(["describe", "--tags", "--always"])
        .output()
        .expect("git describe failed");
    let git_version = String::from_utf8(version.stdout).unwrap();

    let deps = std::process::Command::new("cargo")
        .args(["fetch", "--manifest-path", "Cargo.toml"])
        .output()
        .expect("cargo fetch failed");

    let curl_out = std::process::Command::new("curl")
        .args(["-s", "https://api.example.com/version"])
        .output()
        .expect("curl failed");
    let remote_version = String::from_utf8(curl_out.stdout).unwrap();

    let out_dir = std::env::var("OUT_DIR").unwrap();
    std::fs::write(
        format!("{out_dir}/build_info.rs"),
        format!("pub const GIT_VERSION: &str = \"{git_version}\";"),
    ).unwrap();
}
